title: Tillandsia tillandsioides
taxonomy: Tillandsia tillandsioides is classified as a type of epiphyte, specifically belonging to the family Bromeliaceae. This family consists of over 57 genera and 3,000 species of flowering plants. Tillandsia tillandsioides is a terrestrial species, often found growing in sandy or stony areas. The classification of Tillandsia tillandsioides is further broken down into the genus Tillandsia and the species tillandsioides. Within the bromeliad family, Tillandsia tillandsioides is considered a unique species due to its distinctive characteristics.
